entries.title: Gojo And Geto's Student Bond Sets The Baseline

coordinates.label: Geto is still a student-era idealist

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen Hidden Inventory and Premature Death manga pre-mainline material.

content.fact: During Hidden Inventory, Gojo and Geto are student-era peers whose confidence, trust, and contrasting moral instincts frame the Star Plasma Vessel mission.
content.injection: In Hidden Inventory scenes, write Gojo and Geto as close student peers with real trust and visible ideological contrast, not as their later separated adult states.
constraints: Keep Jujutsu Kaisen 0 and mainline adult fallout gated unless the Context has moved beyond Premature Death.
antiLore: Do not collapse student Geto into his later cult-leader posture before the Premature Death break.

sourceInfo.title: Hidden Inventory
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: Star Plasma Vessel Mission Requires Tengen Merger Context

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen Hidden Inventory and Premature Death manga pre-mainline material.

content.fact: The Star Plasma Vessel mission exists because Riko Amanai is tied to Tengen's merger, making her escort a high-stakes jujutsu society assignment.
content.injection: When the Star Plasma Vessel mission is in Context, treat Riko's protection as an institutional priority tied to Tengen rather than a routine bodyguard job.
constraints: Do not reveal the mission's final outcome before the Context reaches the mission collapse anchor.
antiLore: Do not write Riko as merely a random civilian target with no Tengen context.

sourceInfo.title: Hidden Inventory
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: Riko Amanai Is Targeted As The Star Plasma Vessel

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen Hidden Inventory and Premature Death manga pre-mainline material.

content.fact: Riko Amanai is targeted because of her Star Plasma Vessel role, drawing pressure from groups opposing or exploiting the Tengen merger.
content.injection: During the escort window, keep Riko's danger active and specific: she is being targeted for the Star Plasma Vessel role, not caught in unrelated violence.
constraints: Protect the mission outcome until the Context reaches Riko's death and mission collapse.
antiLore: Do not treat the attackers' motives as interchangeable with ordinary curse attacks.

sourceInfo.title: Hidden Inventory
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: Riko's Human Choice Matters Before Mission Collapse

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen Hidden Inventory and Premature Death manga pre-mainline material.

content.fact: Riko's personal desire to live matters inside the mission; the escort is not only a technical merger procedure.
content.injection: When writing the late escort window, give Riko human agency and emotional stakes around the merger rather than treating her only as a vessel-object.
constraints: Keep the actual collapse and death reveal gated to the collapse anchor.
antiLore: Do not reduce Riko to a passive ritual component in scenes where her choice is in focus.

sourceInfo.title: Hidden Inventory
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.
